The Paylocity Integrations API exposes employees, demographics, status, pay rates, earnings, deductions, local/state taxes, onboarding, payroll history, time and labor, scheduling, learning management, background check, and custom-field data. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials issued by Paylocity. API hosts include api.paylocity.com (production) and a sandbox tenant provided after partner approval.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paylocity Developer Portal
